hero.subtitle: A private four-bedroom retreat above the Andaman Sea.

villa.title: The Heights Villa
villa.description: Perched above the emerald waters of Kata Noi, The Heights Villa offers four elegantly appointed bedrooms, a private infinity pool and sweeping panoramic views across the Andaman Sea. Fully furnished and beautifully maintained, it is the ideal base for exploring Phuket's southern coastline — whether you're here for a long weekend or an extended escape. Book direct for the best rate and a personal welcome.
features: Private infinity pool with ocean views

items.heading: No Platform Fees
items.text: Skip Airbnb and Booking.com. Book direct and pay only for your stay — nothing extra.

items.heading: Personal Service
items.text: A real person answers every question before and during your stay. No bots, no wait queues.

items.heading: Exactly As Described
items.text: Personally managed and consistently maintained. What you see is precisely what you get.

quote.text: Woke up to the sound of the ocean every morning. Absolute paradise — we'll be back.

cta.heading: Ready to escape?
cta.text: Check availability and get a personalised quote — we respond within 24 hours.
